headline: How The Hartford (HIG) Story Is Shifting With Tighter Targets And New Growth Initiatives
summary: Hartford Insurance Group’s fair value price target has been adjusted slightly, moving from US$150.15 to US$150.20, reflecting a very small reset in the modeled level. This kind of fine tuning aligns with recent Street research, where several firms have made clustered, mostly incremental target changes that suggest modest optimism but also some caution on further upside. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets, both higher and lower, can help you track the evolving analyst...
